headline: Arch Capital Buyback Expansion After Strong Q3 Raises Valuation Questions
summary: Arch Capital Group (NasdaqGS:ACGL) reported strong Q3 2025 financial results. The company announced a significant expansion of its share repurchase program alongside the quarterly update. The stock most recently closed at $94.31. For shareholders watching Arch Capital Group, the combination of solid Q3 2025 results and the larger buyback authorization is a meaningful update. The stock has delivered a 146.9% return over the past 5 years and 33.1% over the past 3 years, setting the backdrop...
